ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the component (e.g., resistance, capacitance) */,
  "designator" TEXT /* Designator of the component in the circuit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "capacitance" TEXT /* Capacitance value for capacitors */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "mpn" TEXT /* Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) */,
  "octopart_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's page on Octopart */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the component */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "stock_level_alert" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the component's information was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the component's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the location */,
  "current_stock_value" REAL /* Calculated field reflecting the total value of stock stored at this location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the component is stored */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component stored at the location */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the stock level was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the stock level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id", "component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Number of components ordered */,
  "quantity_received" INTEGER /* Number of components received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_of_materials" (
  "bom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the BOM entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Number of components used in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_of_materials_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_of_materials_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Stored password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low stock, component update) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
